summary: All requirements have been successfully implemented. The diff shows: (1) All India Services messaging added to the hero section with a Globe icon badge and updated service/footer copy mentioning nationwide availability (REQ-14); (2) A new SpecialtyItems component created displaying photo frames, trophies, and antiques with pink-accented images in a responsive grid layout following existing design patterns (REQ-15); (3) Images properly referenced from frontend/public/assets/generated directory with correct paths (REQ-16). No missing requirements or hallucinated features detected.
